title: No GitHub issue integration visible in project/workspace creation
description: No GitHub issue picker or integration is accessible from the Projects view. The 'New Project' button is non-functional (F-028-001), so any GitHub issue integration that might exist within a creation dialog cannot be reached.
steps: 1. Navigate to Projects view. 2. Look for GitHub issue picker or integration. 3. None found.
expected: GitHub issue integration should be available in workspace creation flow
actual: No GitHub-related UI elements visible; creation dialog unreachable
